items.title: Positive vs negative covariance in scatter space
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  pos["Positive Cov: points trend up-right"]
  neg["Negative Cov: points trend down-right"]
  zero["Near-zero Cov: cloud with no linear tilt"]
  pos --> note1["(x - xbar) and (y - ybar) often same sign"]
  neg --> note2["(x - xbar) and (y - ybar) often opposite sign"]
items.caption: Covariance sign comes from whether paired deviations from the means tend to share or oppose the same direction.

items.title: From covariance to correlation
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  cov["Cov(X, Y) in original units"] --> std["Divide by sigma_X * sigma_Y"]
  std --> rho["rho in -1 to 1, scale-free"]
items.caption: Correlation rescales covariance by marginal spreads, removing unit dependence.

items.title: Covariance matrix structure
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  C["Covariance matrix Sigma"]
  C --> diag["Diagonal: Var(X_i)"]
  C --> off["Off-diagonal: Cov(X_i, X_j)"]
  off --> sym["Symmetric: Cov(i,j) = Cov(j,i)"]
items.caption: The covariance matrix packages all pairwise relationships for a multivariate feature vector.
